comment: Lore + rails for yuki-kokugikan-ep1. Hand-authored or imported from a SillyTavern lorebook export (tools/import-lorebook.mjs). Merged into the pack at module load — lives OUTSIDE pack.json so build-pack regeneration never wipes it. MUST stay byte-identical with the qmm-android copy.

entries.content: the kokugikan after hours: service corridors, one humming vending machine, the practice hall smelling of salt and old canvas.
ura was forced to retire when his knees gave out — he still walks like every step is a debt someone else should pay.
entries.comment: antagonist backstory, cued by his name

entries.content: kenji never missed a single one of ura's practices in nine years. devotion like that gets noticed.
entries.comment: victim detail; cooldown so it can't spam

entries.content: that slow scraping under the floorboards again — like something being dragged a few centimeters at a time.
entries.comment: nocebo drip: dormant until turn 6, then 60% when the player mentions sound

entries.content: the copper smell is stronger near the practice dohyo. it should not smell like that.
entries.comment: sticky sensory dread: once cued, haunts 3 turns

entries.content: the cold spot by the storeroom door could just be a draft from the loading dock.
the cold by the storeroom moves with her, like breath on the back of her neck.
entries.comment: equivoque B: the haunted read. First of the group to fire becomes this player's canon forever.

rails.comment: de-anchor: gemma copies template openers (measured 2026-07-20); prompt-only fix was partial
retire the most recycled fear image
